meta.title: HSE Operations — Legal Compliance Register Review
meta.subtitle: Site operations compliance baseline, Plant 2
meta.author: HSE Operations
meta.deid_notice: All personnel are referred to by role label. Identifiers were pseudonymised before drafting; the re-identification key is held separately and is not part of this document.

sections.text: This operations compliance review baselines the site's legal and other-requirements register (ISO 45001 §6.1.3) and tracks each obligation to a named owner and review date. Two obligations are overdue for re-verification.

sections.caption: Legal compliance register — obligation to owner to review date

rows.title: Lifting-equipment examination lapsed
rows.description: Thorough examination for two cranes is past its statutory interval.

rows.title: Pressure-system scheme of examination out of date
rows.description: Written scheme last revalidated 14 months ago against a 12-month cycle.

rows.control: Quarantine the two cranes until re-examined
Automated register reminder 30 days before lapse

rows.action: Re-examine and recertify the two cranes

sections.text: Do not return the quarantined cranes to service until a competent person has signed the thorough examination.

items: Local lifting, pressure-system and fire statutory regimes
